calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Phil Kilduff, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Household Bank (SB), N.A.
Plaintiff's witness: Theresa Flores, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Melvin K. Wong.
Declaration of Plaintiff's witness: Ariel Mendez, rec'd and filed in court.
Exhibit 1 - Invoices-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $10,120.44
Interest $628.79
Attorney's Fees $1,350.00
Costs $345.50, for a total of $12,444.73
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2005 Set For Trial On Jul-25-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
